title: Signal
premise: Forty-one million miles from Earth, mission commander Voss receives impossible voice transmissions from her deceased crewmate, forcing her to confront a terrifying mystery that threatens her sanity and the mission's survival.

character.name: Voss
character.objective: Understand the transmissions and the truth behind Nadia's death, and maintain her sanity and the mission's integrity.
character.secret: She feels immense guilt over Nadia's death and her own survival, and fears these transmissions are either a sign of her unraveling mind or a terrifying, unexplainable reality.
character.voiceArchetype: Mid-40s woman, intelligent, weary, but with an underlying steeliness that is beginning to fray.

listenerRole: You are Voss's second-in-command, the only other living soul on the station, witnessing her unraveling and trying to make sense of the impossible alongside her.

emotionalArc.opening: Shock, resurfacing grief, disbelief, and a profound sense of isolation.
emotionalArc.escalation: Growing dread, paranoia, and a desperate questioning of reality as the transmissions continue and hint at something sinister.
emotionalArc.crisis: Direct confrontation with the source or meaning of the transmissions, revealing a horrifying truth about Nadia's death or the nature of their isolation.
emotionalArc.aftermath: Profound psychological trauma, a new understanding of their reality, or a desperate fight for survival against an unknown threat.

spatialContext.setting: An isolated deep-space research station or ship, millions of miles from Earth.
spatialContext.threatDirection: External (from the void, from the unknown source of the signal), but also internal (Voss's mind, her past trauma).
spatialContext.approachPath: The signal invades Voss's personal space, getting closer and clearer, drawing her and the listener into the mystery.

beats.companionVoiceText: Did you hear that? — No, you couldn't have. Just... a voice. Not static. Not interference.
beats.characterObjective: Confirm what she heard, rationalize the impossible
beats.textWithDirections: <<whispering>> Did you hear that? — No, you couldn't have. Just... a voice. Not static. Not interference.

beats.companionVoiceText: It came again. I recorded it. I don't know what it is, but it's... real. I think.
beats.characterObjective: Document the anomaly, confirm its existence
beats.textWithDirections: <<breathless>> It came again. I recorded it. I don't know what it is, but it's... real. I think.

beats.companionVoiceText: Four minutes. That's how long it took me to unseal the airlock... after. I'm just sitting here, staring at the console. It's... her. It has to be.
beats.characterObjective: Prepare for the inevitable, confront her guilt
beats.hiddenEmotion: Overwhelming guilt, resurfacing grief, terror of confirmation
beats.textWithDirections: <<crying>> Four minutes. That's how long it took me to unseal the airlock... after. I'm just sitting here, staring at the console. It's... her. It has to be.

beats.companionVoiceText: It's Nadia. Her voice. Her cadence. God, it's her. I... I don't understand.
beats.characterObjective: Process the impossible truth, seek understanding
beats.hiddenEmotion: Shock, profound terror, disbelief, resurfacing grief
beats.textWithDirections: <<panicked>> It's Nadia. Her voice. Her cadence. God, it's her. I... I don't understand.

beats.companionVoiceText: She said... 'not what you think. I need you to—' Then nothing. Just... static. What does that even mean? What do we do?
beats.hiddenEmotion: Frozen terror, desperate confusion, profound isolation
beats.textWithDirections: <<gasping>> She said... 'not what you think. I need you to—' Then nothing. Just... static. What does that even mean? What do we do?

beats.companionVoiceText: I didn't report it. To Mission Control. I know... I know it was wrong. Every protocol. But a fourteen-minute delay... I needed to understand it first. Before it became... data.
beats.characterObjective: Justify her decision, confide in the listener.
beats.hiddenEmotion: Guilt, fear of judgment, desperate need for control.
beats.textWithDirections: <<whispering>> I didn't report it. To Mission Control. I know... I know it was wrong. Every protocol. But a fourteen-minute delay... I needed to understand it first. Before it became... data.

beats.companionVoiceText: Then... Day 848. Another signal. Longer this time. I got three full sentences... before it broke apart. She said... 'Voss. I need you to listen to me carefully. What happened to me — there's something in the logs you haven't seen yet.'
beats.characterObjective: Relay the shocking transmission, convey the urgency.
environmentalImportance: the invasive nature of the signal
beats.textWithDirections: <<breathless>> Then... Day 848. Another signal. Longer this time. I got three full sentences... before it broke apart. She said... 'Voss. I need you to listen to me carefully. What happened to me — there's something in the logs you haven't seen yet.'

beats.companionVoiceText: I checked the logs. Nadia's logs. Days 618 through 620. Nothing. Nothing new. I've read them... twice. Checked instrument error. Comm arrays. Everything... clean. It's impossible.
beats.characterObjective: Express her futile attempts to find a rational explanation.
beats.hiddenEmotion: Desperation, disbelief, fear of her own sanity.
beats.textWithDirections: <<panicked>> I checked the logs. Nadia's logs. Days 618 through 620. Nothing. Nothing new. I've read them... twice. Checked instrument error. Comm arrays. Everything... clean. It's impossible.

beats.companionVoiceText: Then yesterday. Day 849. Same time. 03:14. 'Third transmission. I know this is difficult. I know what it sounds like. I need you to check the external array housing. Specifically the secondary relay panel. There's something—' Then static. And... '—please, Voss.'
beats.characterObjective: Convey the direct, urgent command from the transmission.
beats.hiddenEmotion: Pure terror, profound shock, a sense of being hunted.
environmentalImportance: the direct, invasive sound of the voice
beats.textWithDirections: <<gasping>> Then yesterday. Day 849. Same time. 03:14. 'Third transmission. I know this is difficult. I know what it sounds like. I need you to check the external array housing. Specifically the secondary relay panel. There's something—' Then static. And... '—please, Voss.'

beats.companionVoiceText: Nadia... she said 'please' once. In 847 days. Day one. My yogurt. She said... 'please, Commander, that was the last one.' She never said it again. Until now.
beats.characterObjective: Process the emotional impact of 'please,' connect it to her memory of Nadia.
beats.hiddenEmotion: Deep grief, confusion, a desperate hope mixed with terror.
beats.textWithDirections: <<crying>> Nadia... she said 'please' once. In 847 days. Day one. My yogurt. She said... 'please, Commander, that was the last one.' She never said it again. Until now.

beats.companionVoiceText: I... I picked up my toolkit. I'm going to the airlock. I have to. Right? To check the panel. What else can I do?
beats.characterObjective: Seek validation for her desperate, dangerous decision.
beats.hiddenEmotion: Desperation, fear, a sense of being compelled.
beats.textWithDirections: <<panicked>> I... I picked up my toolkit. I'm going to the airlock. I have to. Right? To check the panel. What else can I do?

beats.companionVoiceText: I found something. In the secondary relay panel. This... device. I don't know what it is.
beats.characterObjective: Identify the object, understand its purpose
beats.textWithDirections: <<breathless>> I found something. In the secondary relay panel. This... device. I don't know what it is.

beats.companionVoiceText: It's not in any database. Nothing matches. But the materials... the placement. Someone put it there. Deliberately. It's only receiving, you know? Not sending.
beats.characterObjective: Convey the sinister implications of the device
beats.textWithDirections: <<panicked>> It's not in any database. Nothing matches. But the materials... the placement. Someone put it there. Deliberately. It's only receiving, you know? Not sending.

beats.companionVoiceText: Nadia... I keep thinking about her face. Three seconds before the malfunction. Could it be... designed? This device... it's connected, isn't it? To the voice. Her voice. But you already know that.
beats.characterObjective: Express the terrifying connection to Nadia's death
beats.textWithDirections: <<crying>> Nadia... I keep thinking about her face. Three seconds before the malfunction. Could it be... designed? This device... it's connected, isn't it? To the voice. Her voice. But you already know that...

beats.companionVoiceText: It just came again. The last one. Four words. But you already know.
beats.textWithDirections: <<gasping>> It just came again. The last one. Four words. But you already know.

beats.companionVoiceText: I'm reporting it. To Earth. I have to. But this... this silence now... it feels like the beginning of something. Not the end.
beats.characterObjective: Communicate her decision and lingering dread
beats.hiddenEmotion: Profound unease, resignation, a sense of impending doom
beats.textWithDirections: <<breathless>> I'm reporting it. To Earth. I have to. But this... this silence now... it feels like the beginning of something. Not the end.
